title: campanula scouleri
intro: Campanula scouleri, also known as Scouler's campanula, is a perennial plant species in the bellflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its chemical constituents such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer health benefits including wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial protection. Campanula scouleri can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
